currentObjective: Build a repo-native security and vulnerability agent that scans repo files, git history, config/workflows, and AWS exposure signals; coordinates between Codex and Claude; and blocks accidental public exposure.
mergePolicy: No merge to master without explicit user approval.

workstreams.goal: Create the `.secops` control plane, shared status polling, repo/git/config scanners, and safe remediation primitives.
chunks: Scaffold `.secops` control files and status scripts
Implement repo, git-history, and config scanners
Run focused verification and publish findings

workstreams.goal: Add AWS exposure scanning, findings export, playbooks, and CI gates that fail on critical issues.

coordinationRules: Read `.secops/plan.json`, `.secops/ownership.json`, and both status files before starting a new chunk.
Poll the other agent status file every 5 seconds while actively working.
Keep write scopes disjoint and update ownership before crossing boundaries.
Record blockers immediately in the status file.
Critical findings should block deployment until triaged.
